name: latency-mobile
description: iOS scaffolding manifest for the Latency mobile target. Kept separate from the root (desktop/Electron) package.json so Capacitor deps never touch the Electron toolchain. The web bundle is built by the root `build:mobile` script (Vite/React/zustand come from the root node_modules); these deps are only used by the Capacitor CLI to scaffold/sync the native iOS project in CI.
